object_a.label: rug
object_a.description: large light beige carpet/rug covering foreground living area
object_a.long_form_open_description: Light beige wall-to-wall carpet or large rug occupying the living room floor area from foreground to just before the kitchen. Low pile, neutral tone that contrasts with darker leather furniture and transitions to wood or tile in the kitchen area.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Extends from the camera position forward, under the couch and recliner, stopping near the kitchen threshold
